info.title: SmartRest AIoT API
info.description: RESTful API for smart mattress monitoring system supporting patients, doctors, customers, and admins.

get.description: Retrieve AI-generated sleep report including sleep stages, posture map, and overall sleep score

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient ID (required for doctors/admins, not for patients)

403.description: Unauthorized - No access to this patient's data

get.description: Retrieve consolidated health vitals and trends with flagged anomalies

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient ID (required for doctors/admins, not for patients)

403.description: Unauthorized - No access to this patient's data

post.description: Create a new patient or customer account

get.description: Verify user email address via verification link

post.description: Authenticate user and issue access token

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile and role-specific information

post.description: Revoke existing tokens and issue a new access token
Send a password reset link to the provided email address

message.example: Reset link sent to your email

post.description: Reset user password using the reset token

message.example: Social login is not implemented yet

post.description: Send a message to a recipient (patient to doctor, doctor to patient, customer to support)

body.example: I've reviewed your latest sleep report and have some recommendations.

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to message this recipient

message.example: You can only message your assigned doctors

get.description: Retrieve message thread between the current user and another user or from a specific message

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: User ID or message ID (prefixed with 'msg_')

get.description: Retrieve unread notifications and alerts for the current user

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read

get.description: Returns paginated list of smart bed products

post.description: Create a new product in the catalog

description.example: Advanced smart mattress with sleep tracking

get.description: Display details of a specific product

post.description: Upload batched sensor readings from smart bed

get.description: Get latest readings for each sensor type for the patient

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient ID (required for doctors, not for patients)

403.description: Unauthorized - No access to this patient

message.example: You do not have access to this patient

get.description: Retrieve historical sensor readings with filtering options

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient ID (required for doctors, not for patients)

403.description: Unauthorized - No access to this patient

message.example: You do not have access to this patient

get.description: Retrieve system status including uptime, firmware version and sensor health

403.description: Unauthorized - Admin or doctor access required

post.description: Remotely trigger a restart of the smart bed system

message.example: Unauthorized - only admins can reboot devices

get.description: Returns paginated list of users (Admin only)

post.description: Create a new user manually (Admin only)

get.description: Returns user details by ID (Admin or self access only)

put.description: Update an existing user (Admin or self access only)

delete.description: Deactivate or hard delete a user (Admin only)

SensorReading.title: Sensor Reading
SensorReading.description: Sensor data reading from a smart bed
